files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,9 @@
 id: changelog
 name: Tenzir Changelog
-description: The Tenzir Changelog Management Utility
+description: >-
+  A changelog management framework that curates entries, ships release notes,
+  and assembles public changelogs.
 repository: tenzir/changelog
 components:
-- cli
-- python
+  - cli
+  - python
